title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is ON
scenario: Verify that the Share Data toggle persists its ON state after app restart when enabled.
steps: Start the app fresh (clear app data or reinstall).
Enable Share Data (select location permission option on iOS).
Navigate to App Settings > General > Account.
Confirm the Share Data toggle is ON and the description is correct.
Navigate again to App Settings > General > Account.
Verify the Share Data toggle remains ON.
expected: The Share Data toggle remains ON after app restart.
